extensions.title: Document Browser
extensions.description: Browse open documents in a detached, resizable, closable window.

extensions.title: JSON Formatter
extensions.description: Format JSON documents with stable indentation and sorted keys.

extensions.title: C/PHP Formatter
extensions.description: Format PHP, C, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, and CSS brace-style code.

extensions.title: Clipboard Slots
extensions.description: Save and reuse text clipboard content across 10 named slots.

extensions.title: AI Summarizer
extensions.description: Send selected text to a configured agent and summarize it.

extensions.title: AI Code Explainer
extensions.description: Explain selected code through a configured agent using filename and language context.

extensions.title: AI Code Refactor Assistant
extensions.description: Suggest safer refactors for selected code through a configured agent.

extensions.title: AI Meeting Notes Cleaner
extensions.description: Clean selected meeting notes into summary, decisions, actions, and open questions.

extensions.title: AI Smart Search
extensions.description: Search open documents semantically through a configured agent.

extensions.title: Pro Themes
extensions.description: Add Night, Paper, Terminal, Ocean, Forest, Sunset, Lavender, and High Contrast editor themes.

extensions.title: Markdown Preview
extensions.description: Preview Markdown from the current document or selection in a detached, resizable, closable window.

extensions.title: Export Tools
extensions.description: Export the current document as PDF, HTML, Markdown, or RTF where practical.

extensions.title: Document Statistics
extensions.description: Show word, character, line, selection, and reading-time statistics for the current document.

extensions.title: Diff Viewer
extensions.description: Compare the current document against clipboard text or another file in a detached diff window.

extensions.title: Auto Backup / Versions
extensions.description: Create optional local timestamped editing snapshots and browse version history.

extensions.title: Clipboard & Snippets Manager
extensions.description: Manage recent clipboard text and pinned named snippets in a detached, resizable, closable panel.

extensions.title: File Outline
extensions.description: Show Markdown headings and simple code symbols in a detached, resizable, closable navigation panel.

extensions.title: CSV Table Viewer
extensions.description: Preview CSV or TSV text as a readable table without changing the original plain text.

extensions.title: Markdown Tools
extensions.description: Add Markdown editing commands for checkboxes, tables, lists, and ordered-list renumbering.

extensions.title: Encoding / Line Ending Tools
extensions.description: Show current text encoding and convert line endings between Unix, Windows, and classic Mac styles.

extensions.title: Focus / Typewriter Mode
extensions.description: Add distraction-free editing with optional current-line focus and typewriter scrolling.
